author: GOqH
content: Plan: Fix all 94 pedantic warnings per crate. Strategy: (1) missing_errors_doc — add concise # Errors sections to public Result-returning fns; (2) cast_possible_truncation — u32::try_from at I/O boundaries (frame headers), allow with comment when bounds are static; (3) uninlined_format_args — inline; (4) must_use_candidate — add #[must_use]; (5) similar_names labels_a/labels_b — allow with reason; (6) too_many_lines round_trip — allow with reason; (7) unused_async run_fake_supervisor — allow with reason. No blanket allows. Order: protocol -> supervisor -> server -> client -> bin -> e2e -> verify.
